data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for configuring real-time data streaming. Published API scope combines subscription management with real-time point-data delivery.
buyer_guidance: Use this API when the integration needs low-latency point data delivery and can manage subscription configuration and webhook endpoints.
overview: RESTful API for configuring real-time data streaming. The Streaming API is about configuring and consuming real-time data delivery from Building X points. Asset data is Un-Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope combines subscription management with real-time point-data delivery.

ingest_considerations: This surface includes telemetry or event-oriented payloads that should be modeled for time-based ingestion or monitoring workflows.
The published surface includes mutation or submission capabilities, so integrations should enforce explicit governance around which upstream systems are allowed to write.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Streaming API.
